title: Craft-able Spawners
description: This mod makes spawners craftable using 8 chains.
body:
This mod makes spawners craftable using 8 chains.
![8 chains set up like if you were making a chest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/rcW1bOki/images/1ffb5b36f32870e6bca6452e4b85910009a3097d.png)
I made a discord server you can join if you want [https://discord.gg/UbPywERWPC](https://discord.gg/UbPywERWPC)
